hero.title: Roadside Recovery in the UAE
hero.subtitle: Broken down? Get instant help from the nearest trusted provider

features.title: Why RescueGo?
features.fastDesc: Nearby providers ready to help within minutes
features.trustedDesc: All providers are verified and certified
features.transparentDesc: Know the cost upfront — no hidden fees

services.title: Our Services
services.towingDesc: Safe transport of your vehicle to any destination
services.batteryDesc: Jump start or replace your car battery
services.fuelDesc: Emergency fuel delivery to your vehicle

howItWorks.title: How RescueGo Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your problem and share your location
howItWorks.step2Desc: The nearest available provider responds to your request
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track your request status in real time
howItWorks.step4Desc: Rate your experience and get back on the road

cta.title: Need help?
cta.subtitle: Request a rescue now and get help within minutes

page.heroTitle: Broken down in the UAE? Help is minutes away.
page.heroSubtitle: Fast access to trusted nearby recovery providers across the Emirates. Free for drivers, built for urgent roadside moments.

howItWorks.title: A simple request flow
howItWorks.subtitle: Drivers can ask for help quickly, while providers get a focused path to accept and complete work.

0.title: Pin your location
0.text: Share the breakdown location, choose the issue, and see a clear estimated service range before submitting.

1.title: Provider accepts
1.text: A vetted recovery provider accepts the request from their dashboard and confirms they are on the way.

2.title: Complete and rate
2.text: Pay the provider directly after service, then leave a rating to keep the marketplace trustworthy.

providers.title: A cleaner way to receive recovery jobs
providers.subtitle: Providers can register, upload documents, subscribe or use pay-per-job access, then manage open requests from the dashboard.

0.question: Is RescueGo free for drivers?
0.answer: Yes. Drivers do not pay RescueGo. The customer pays the recovery provider directly after the service.

1.question: How do providers join?
1.answer: Providers register, upload required documents, select a plan, and wait for admin review before activation.

2.question: Does RescueGo handle customer payments?
2.answer: No. Customers pay providers directly. Stripe is only used for provider subscriptions and platform charges.

about.title: About RescueGo
about.mission: Our mission is to make roadside recovery fast, reliable, and transparent for every driver in the UAE.
about.heroSubtitle: The UAE's first open marketplace for roadside recovery. Built for drivers, powered by providers.

problem.title: The Problem We Solve
problem.p1: In the UAE, when your car breaks down — whether on Sheikh Zayed Road, the Abu Dhabi highway, or in the desert — you have no reliable way to find a nearby, trusted recovery provider quickly.
problem.p2: Existing solutions are fragmented: phone calls, WhatsApp groups, or apps tied to a single company. No open marketplace exists. Until now.

items.0: Call 10 numbers to find someone available
items.1: No idea if provider is legitimate
items.2: No tracking — just wait and hope
items.4: No way to rate or review

solution.title: The RescueGo Solution
solution.p1: RescueGo connects drivers with broken-down vehicles to nearby, vetted recovery providers in real time. Providers pay to access the platform — customers use it completely free.
solution.p2: We never touch customer money. You pay the provider directly, cash or card. We just connect you.

items.3: Price range shown before you request

builder.title: Built by Mohamed Elnahrawy
builder.description: RescueGo was designed and built as a production-grade SaaS product for the UAE market. The platform uses modern technology — Supabase, Next.js, Stripe, and Google Maps — to deliver a real-time, reliable experience for both drivers and providers.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. If you're broken down, help is still available.
